allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\); const v=JSON.parse\(d\); const latest14=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''''14.''''\)\).slice\(-5\); const latest15=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''''15.''''\)\).slice\(-5\); console.log\(''''Latest 14.x:'''', latest14\); console.log\(''''Latest 15.x:'''', latest15\);")
